summary.sosovalue: Community sentiment around SoSoValue is predominantly positive and anticipatory, driven by excitement over Season 2 airdrop snapshots starting in May 2026, with users urging each other to complete verification up to 120% reliability score and maximize EXP points before random snapshots through the end of the month. Key discussions revolve around checking testnet airdrop claims on Sodex points page, upcoming mainnet distributions, and the platform's ecosystem including AI-driven tools, research competitions with $100K prizes, and integration with Sodex for trading. Metrics from posts show strong engagement like post [post:27] with 50 likes, 24 replies, 2069 views highlighting airdrop instructions and referral links, while others note $SOSO price at ~$0.42, SSI staking TVL ~$99M with 20.5%+ APY and 488K holders, alongside achievement boasts like 7 million EXPs; however, minor cautions exist about eligibility criteria and potential price dumps due to unlocks and low liquidity.<grok:render type="render_inline_citation"><argument name="citation_id">27</argument></grok:render><grok:render type="render_inline_citation"><argument name="citation_id">26</argument></grok:render><grok:render type="render_inline_citation"><argument name="citation_id">30</argument></grok:render>
summary.sodex: Sentiment for Sodex is bullish and action-oriented, with users promoting its mainnet trading of crypto and stocks, weekly 1M SoPoints rewards, 5% boosts via referrals, and testnet airdrop claims ahead of May 8 distribution, though some express frustration over high gas fees for small volumes like $30 trades yielding only 11k volume. Discussions focus on farming strategies such as depositing USDC, doing volume (e.g., 20k for 100% RUP), Gold tier achievements (top 0.12% with 3.898 SoPoints), and its role in SoSoValue ecosystem for execution alongside indexes. High engagement posts include [post:25] at 46 likes/46 replies/2627 views on Binance alpha gems indirectly tied, but Sodex-specific like referrals and alerts with 150M $SOSO pool (~80M USDT over 6 months, 1M pts/week limit); concerns about weird snapshot moves and eligibility but overall hype prevails.<grok:render type="render_inline_citation"><argument name="citation_id">29</argument></grok:render><grok:render type="render_inline_citation"><argument name="citation_id">4</argument></grok:render><grok:render type="render_inline_citation"><argument name="citation_id">30</argument></grok:render>
